case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA VS. ANNA TRAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
